dialogue: How many missiles can one enemy have?
Too many. But they still have not patched the navigation backdoor.
Field teams recovered documents from the raid. We may finally get a name.
*a new alarm tone rolls through the room, lower and heavier than before*
That is not the normal missile alarm.
Unidentified object. Moving fast. Very large.
*the camera feed resolves into the largest missile the agency has ever seen*
It is still running Dijkstra. Bigger body, same shortest-path logic.
{endDistance}. They increased the missile range, but not its brain.
Then give me every wall you can spare.
You have them. Build a route it cannot survive.
